mapper.sql: query_id, question, answer, selected_concept_ids, selected_article_keys, source_file_paths, corrections::text as corrections, review_status, created_at, expires_at
mapper.insert: insert into pending_queries ( query_id, question, answer, selected_concept_ids, selected_article_keys, source_file_paths, corrections, review_status, created_at, expires_at ) values ( #{record.queryId}, #{record.question}, #{record.answer}, #{record.selectedConceptIds,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.selectedArticleKeys,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.sourceFilePaths,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.StringListArrayTypeHandler}, #{record.correctionsJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{record.reviewStatus}, #{record.createdAt}, #{record.expiresAt} ) on conflict (query_id) do update set answer = excluded.answer, selected_concept_ids = excluded.selected_concept_ids, selected_article_keys = excluded.selected_article_keys, source_file_paths = excluded.source_file_paths, corrections = excluded.corrections, review_status = excluded.review_status, expires_at = excluded.expires_at
mapper.select: select from pending_queries where expires_at >= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP order by created_at desc, query_id desc
